project_name: Smart-controlled community-integrated photovoltaic-plus-storage and electric mobility infrastructure for municipality-owned sites
project_summary: Nicosia's investment concept combines smart-controlled solar photovoltaic systems and battery storage on municipality-owned sites with electric-vehicle charging infrastructure.
category: Renewable energy and sustainable urban mobility
finance_route: EUCF grant support for investment-concept development
interventions: Solar photovoltaic systems on municipality-owned buildings
Battery storage integrated with municipal solar generation
known_gaps: The target project's underlying investment value and implementation status are not confirmed.
